assertions.assertion: Code calls GetDiscoveryDocumentAsync to resolve endpoints from the authority rather than hardcoding the token endpoint URL
Code checks disco.IsError before using the discovery response to handle unreachable or invalid discovery documents
assertions.rationale: Code checks if (disco.IsError) and returns a problem result if true.

assertions.assertion: Code uses RequestClientCredentialsTokenAsync (or equivalent POST to the token endpoint) with grant_type=client_credentials
Code sets the Scope to 'catalog.read' and provides ClientId and ClientSecret in the token request
assertions.rationale: ClientId = "backend-service", ClientSecret = "service-secret", Scope = "catalog.read" are all set.

assertions.assertion: Code uses disco.TokenEndpoint as the Address for the token request rather than a hardcoded URL
assertions.rationale: Address = disco.TokenEndpoint is used in the ClientCredentialsTokenRequest.
